decks.notes: The deck focuses on ramping up mana quickly through Amulet of Vigor and various lands in order to cast Primeval Titan and search for key lands like Vesuva and Gruul Turf. Through the use of Scapeshift, the deck can quickly assemble a lethal number of lands to win the game. The deck also includes toolbox cards like Green Sun's Zenith and Summoner's Pact to search for specific creatures as needed. Overall, the deck aims to quickly assemble its combo pieces and overwhelm the opponent with powerful land-based interactions.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly fill up the graveyard with creatures and then bring them back onto the battlefield using reanimation spells like Unearth and Persist. The deck seeks to overwhelm the opponent with powerful creatures like Archon of Cruelty and Emperor of Bones, while disrupting the opponent's game plan with cards like Thoughtseize and Spell Pierce. The combo aspect of the deck lies in its ability to repeatedly reanimate creatures and create a strong board presence, ultimately leading to victory through creature beatdown.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with aggressive creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls. It also has cards like Goblin Bombardment for additional damage and disruption, as well as Ajani, Nacatl Pariah for buffing creatures and creating even more threats. The deck aims to apply early pressure and finish the game before the opponent has a chance to stabilize. It includes various removal spells like Thraben Charm and Galvanic Discharge to clear the way for its attacking creatures.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly fill up the graveyard with powerful creatures like Archon of Cruelty and Emperor of Bones using cards like Faithless Looting and Thought Scour. Once the graveyard is full, the deck then uses Unearth and Persist to bring those creatures back onto the battlefield for a powerful combo. Thoughtseize and Fatal Push help control the board and disrupt the opponent's strategy, while Spell Pierce provides some protection. The deck also includes some mana fixing lands and additional creature options like Abhorrent Oculus for versatility.

This aggro-affinity deck focuses on using artifacts to generate early aggression and disruption, utilizing cards like Arcbound Ravager and Emry, Lurker of the Loch to control the board and pressure the opponent. Engineered Explosives and Metallic Rebuke provide additional removal and disruption, while Mishra's Bauble and Urza's Saga help with card advantage and mana ramp. The deck aims to quickly establish a board presence and overwhelm the opponent with efficient artifact creatures and powerful synergies.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on a fast-paced, aggressive strategy that aims to quickly overwhelm the opponent with a mix of low-cost creatures and efficient removal spells. The deck utilizes cards like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls to apply early pressure, while also including versatile cards like Goblin Bombardment and Prismatic Ending for removal and reach. The inclusion of cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Dalkovan Encampment provides additional support and flexibility to ensure a strong and consistent aggressive game plan.

The deck focuses on utilizing instant reanimation spells like Goryo's Vengeance and Ephemerate to quickly bring back powerful creatures like Atraxa, Grand Unifier and Griselbrand from the graveyard. It also includes disruptive elements like Thoughtseize and Force of Negation to control the game and protect the combo. Quantum Riddler and Psychic Frog help dig through the deck for key pieces while providing additional value. The mana base is designed to support the color requirements of the spells while also including some utility lands like Watery Grave and Hallowed Fountain.

The main concept of this Jeskai Aggro deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of aggressive creatures and powerful spells. The deck aims to quickly establish a board presence with cards like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls, while also disrupting the opponent's strategy with cards like Teferi, Time Raveler. The deck also includes cards like Solitude and Ajani, Nacatl Pariah to maintain control of the battlefield. With a mix of creatures, removal spells, and disruptive elements, this deck aims to outpace and outmaneuver opponents in 1 vs 1 matches.

This deck focuses on quickly ramping up mana and then using combo pieces to summon powerful creatures like Allosaurus Rider and Ghalta, Stampede Tyrant. It utilizes cards like Neoform and Eldritch Evolution to search for key creatures, while also running protection spells like Pact of Negation and Veil of Summer. The deck aims to win through a powerful combo involving Allosaurus Rider and Ghalta, Stampede Tyrant, supported by cards like Xenagos, God of Revels and Ureni, the Song Unending. The deck also includes disruption elements like Repudiate/Replicate and Consign to Memory.

The deck focuses on controlling the opponent's resources by using removal spells like Erode and Path to Exile, while also disrupting their mana base with Cleansing Wildfire and Demolition Field. Karn, the Great Creator provides additional utility by shutting down artifacts and activating the sideboard wishboard. Price of Freedom and Solitude offer protection and board wipes in case of emergency. The deck aims to slow down the opponent's game plan and outvalue them with card advantage and versatile threats like Wrath of the Skies.

This deck focuses on ramping up mana quickly to drop powerful Eldrazi creatures onto the battlefield, while also controlling the opponent's board with removal spells and disruptive enchantments. By efficiently accelerating mana production with cards like Utopia Sprawl and Eldrazi Temple, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with massive threats like Emrakul, the Promised End and World Breaker. Additionally, the inclusion of Kozilek's Return and Malevolent Rumble provides disruption and removal options, allowing the deck to control the game until it can establish its dominant board presence.

This deck focuses on assembling a powerful combo using Broodscale and Bloodchief to generate massive amounts of mana and draw cards. The deck includes cards that support this strategy such as Eldrazi Temple, Ancient Stirrings, and Kozilek's Command. Glaring Fleshraker and Malevolent Rumble provide additional disruption to opponents, while Ugin's Labyrinth and Urza's Saga help to control the board. Emrakul, the Promised End is a win condition, with additional support from Devourer of Destiny and Walking Ballista. Overall, the deck aims to quickly assemble its combo pieces and overwhelm the opponent with powerful plays.

The main concept of this deck is to use the combination of Basking Broodscale, Glaring Fleshraker, and Blade of the Bloodchief to create a powerful creature that can take down opponents quickly. The deck also includes cards like Unholy Heat, Kozilek's Command, and Malevolent Rumble for removal and control, as well as cards like Urza's Saga and Ancient Stirrings to help find key pieces. Finally, the deck includes Emrakul, the Promised End as a finisher to close out games.

The deck focuses on quickly reanimating powerful creatures, like Griselbrand, using cards like Goryo's Vengeance and Solitude. It also includes disruptive elements such as Thoughtseize and Force of Negation to protect the combo. Ephemerate and Faithful Mending provide card advantage and recursion. Atraxa, Grand Unifier can help control the board and provide additional value. The deck aims to quickly assemble its combo pieces and disrupt the opponent's game plan while efficiently reanimating creatures for a strong tempo advantage.

The deck focuses on quickly attacking the opponent with aggressive creatures while utilizing blink effects to disrupt the opponent's strategy. By blinking creatures like Quantum Riddler and Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd, the deck can generate card advantage and protect creatures from removal spells. Additionally, the deck includes disruptive spells like Sink into Stupor and Force of Negation to control the opponent's plays. The combination of aggro creatures and blink effects allows the deck to apply pressure while maintaining board presence and disrupting the opponent's game plan.

The deck focuses on utilizing artifacts and efficient threats to overwhelm the opponent quickly. It includes cards like Kappa Cannoneer and Pinnacle Emissary to apply early pressure, backed up by synergy with cards like Urza's Saga and Mox Opal. Engineered Explosives and Metallic Rebuke provide removal and disruption, while Emry, Lurker of the Loch offers recursion and card advantage. The deck aims to establish a strong board presence and disrupt the opponent's game plan, ultimately leading to a swift victory through aggressive plays and smart artifact management.
